overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a fantasy adventure game showing a character in green clothing ascending a snowy mountain at night, paragliding down a slope, and encountering wildlife in a winter wilderness environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: steep snowy mountainside with adjacent rock wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily up the steep snow-covered slope alongside a large rock formation on the left

entered.detail: large dark rock formation running parallel to the path on the left side
snow-covered evergreen trees visible on the distant ridge ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks steadily uphill along a snowy mountainside at night, with a large rock wall to the left and snow-covered pine trees visible in the distance against a starry sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain ridge with scattered snow-laden pine trees

events.description: moving from narrow rock-lined path to open ridge with scattered pine trees on both sides

agents.ego_description: continuing to climb the ridge, approaching the summit with snow-covered trees flanking the path

entered.detail: distant rock formation visible as the wall recedes

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the open ridge where the rock wall falls away and scattered snow-covered pine trees appear on both sides, continuing the ascent toward the peak.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial descent over snowy mountain valley

events.description: character jumps from ridge edge and deploys paraglider to descend the mountainside
character lands on the snow-covered slope below and stows the paraglider

agents.ego_description: gliding down the mountainside using a red and gold paraglider, then landing and transitioning back to walking

entered.detail: red and gold patterned paraglider canopy deployed above the character
snow-covered valley and lower slopes visible during the aerial descent

segments.scene_description: The character launches from the ridge and paraglides down over the snowy mountain terrain, revealing the valley below, before landing and continuing on foot.

events.description: large moose with antlers appears standing near pine trees on the left

agents.ego_description: walking through the lower snowfield and approaching a large moose standing near the trees

notable_agents.action: large moose with antlers standing near snow-covered pines, then walking away as the character approaches

entered.detail: snow-covered boulder formation on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: After landing, the character walks through the lower snowfield where a snow-covered rock outcropping appears on the right, and encounters a large moose standing among the pine trees on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character ascends a steep, starry mountainside before descending into a snowy valley wilderness. It begins with a steady climb uphill along a rock wall, with snow-covered pine trees appearing in the distance under a clear night sky. As the character reaches the open ridge, the rock wall falls away to reveal scattered pines on both sides during the final push toward the peak. The scene then shifts from a climb to a glide as the character launches into the air, paragliding over the rugged mountain terrain to reveal the expansive valley below. Finally, the camera follows the character after landing, moving through a lower snowfield past a rock outcropping before encountering a large moose standing among the pine trees.
